title: Function jump panel for pseudo-code viewer with intersection observer
purpose: Provides a navigational panel that lists functions in a pseudo-code document and highlights the currently active function based on scroll position, allowing users to jump to specific functions.
module_context: Exports a default React component FunctionJumpPanel that accepts functions list and viewer reference as props, and uses IntersectionObserver to track active function.

steps.content: Accept functions list and viewer reference as props.
Initialize state for tracking the active function.
Setup IntersectionObserver to detect which function is currently in view.
Return null if no functions are provided.
Render the function list with export indicators and click handlers.
Disconnect previous IntersectionObserver if it exists.
Return early if no functions are present.
Create a new IntersectionObserver to track function visibility.
Observe all elements with data-function attribute.
Cleanup by disconnecting the observer on unmount or function list change.
Scroll to the specified function in the pseudo-code viewer.
